subject: [PATCH v5 30/36] mm: add NODE_PRIVATE_CAP_NUMA_BALANCING for private-node NUMA balancing

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch adds support for private-node NUMA balancing in the Linux kernel. It introduces a new capability, NODE_PRIVATE_CAP_NUMA_BALANCING, which allows private nodes to participate in NUMA balancing. The patch also includes changes to the node_private.h and internal.h files to implement this new capability. Unlike demotion, NUMA balancing is not reclaim-driven, so this capability stands alone and does not require CAP_RECLAIM. This change enables access-based promotion/migration of private nodes, allowing them to participate in NUMA balancing like normal nodes.
